mapper.select: select id, task_code, task_name, handler_code, cron_expression, execution_mode, status, description, last_fire_at, next_fire_at, created_at, updated_at from scheduled_tasks where status = 'ENABLED' order by id asc
select id, task_code, task_name, handler_code, cron_expression, execution_mode, status, description, last_fire_at, next_fire_at, created_at, updated_at from scheduled_tasks where id = #{id}

select id, task_code, task_name, handler_code, cron_expression, execution_mode, status, description, last_fire_at, next_fire_at, created_at, updated_at from scheduled_tasks where task_code = #{taskCode}
mapper.update: update scheduled_tasks set task_name = #{taskName}, handler_code = #{handlerCode}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, execution_mode = #{executionMode}, status = #{status}, description = #{description} where id = #{id}
update scheduled_tasks set last_fire_at = #{lastFireAt}, next_fire_at = coalesce(#{nextFireAt}, next_fire_at) where id = #{id}
update scheduled_task_runs set status = #{status}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, affected_rows = #{affectedRows}, error_msg = #{errorMsg} where id = #{id}
